ab: nakemuda sun a mangtjez?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: nadjemavac aken.
en: I came on foot.

ab: anema su tinevavavan a zidusia?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: natjevavaw aken ta basu.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: anema su tjevavavan a sema kiukay?
en: A: What bus do you take to church?

ab: pivavaven aken ta zidusia ni kama a sema zua.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: nukazumazuman kemuda timadju a sema gakku?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: tjevavav tua napatjatjeketjak a tjatjevavavan timadju a sema kakituluan.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: kemuda ti su vuvu nu vaik a kiveli ta ljaceng?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: ki’utubay timadju nu vaik a kiljaceng.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: uri kemuda sun a vaik a sema Langi?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: uri tjevavav aken ta varukur a sema Langi.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: uri kemuda timadju a vaik a sema Langi?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: tjevavav ta hikuki a sema Langi timadju.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: anema a uri tjevavavan nimadju a sema Takau?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: tjevavav ta tjaljasaljiukan a sema Takau timadju.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: natjevavav ta kisia a sema Taitu timadju?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ui, natjevavav ta kisia a sema Taitu timadju.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: natjevavav ta kisia timadju a pasa Taitu?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ini, natjevavaw timadju tua hikuki a sema Taitu.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: izua a ljaljevavavan ta basu i dudut ta icu imaza?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: izua, kisusu-u a sema ’ayav ki sun a pacun tua ljaljevavavan ta basu.
ch: B:有，順著往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: aicu a imaza inu a tjaljadudutan ta napatjatjaketjak a tjatjevavavan?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: neka nuljaljevavavan imaza ta napatjatjaketjak a tjatjevavavan, amin a tjevavav ta zidusia.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: nu tjevavav ta basu a pasa gakku aki izua makudakuda a zikan?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: tapuluq katu lima a tukian ki djemaljun i gakku.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: nu tjevavav tua tjaljasaljiukan a pasa Taiciu aki izua makudakuda a tukian ki djemaljun?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: izua ita tukian ki djemaljun i Taiciu.
ch: B:有一個小時的時間會到臺中。
en: B: I will be in Taichung for an hour.

ab: nu ungting ta zidusia a sema Qulay aki cuay a zikang?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: tjara izua a ita a tukian.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: nu tjevavav sun a kemasi tua napatjatjatjatjak a tjatjevavavan a sema tjanuamen aki izua makudakuda a zikang?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久時間?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by MRT?

ab: drusa a puluq a tukian.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: macaqu sun a kitulai?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: ui, macaqu aken a kitulai.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: izua a su qutubay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: izua ku qutubay a ita.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: izua a su qutubay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: neka nu ku qutubay.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
